2603.15980.title: Standardizing Medical Images at Scale for AI
2603.15980.paper_summary: Deep learning has achieved remarkable success in medical image analysis, yet its performance remains highly sensitive to the heterogeneity of clinical data. Differences in imaging hardware, staining protocols, and acquisition conditions produce substantial domain shifts that degrade model generalization across institutions. Here we present a physics-based data preprocessing framework based on the PhyCV (Physics-Inspired Computer Vision) family of algorithms, which standardizes medical images through deterministic transformations derived from optical physics. The framework models images as spatially varying optical fields that undergo a virtual diffractive propagation followed by coherent phase detection. This process suppresses non-semantic variability such as color and illumination differences while preserving diagnostically relevant texture and structural features. When applied to histopathological images from the Camelyon17-WILDS benchmark, PhyCV preprocessing improves out-of-distribution breast-cancer classification accuracy from 70.8% (Empirical Risk Minimization baseline) to 90.9%, matching or exceeding data-augmentation and domain-generalization approaches at negligible computational cost. Because the transform is physically interpretable, parameterizable, and differentiable, it can be deployed as a fixed preprocessing stage or integrated into end-to-end learning. These results establish PhyCV as a generalizable data refinery for medical imaging-one that harmonizes heterogeneous datasets through first-principles physics, improving robustness, interpretability, and reproducibility in clinical AI systems.
2603.15980.paper_summary_zh: 深度學習在醫學影像分析中取得了顯著的成功，但其性能仍然對臨床數據的異質性高度敏感。影像硬體、染色協議和獲取條件的差異產生了顯著的領域轉變，降低了模型在不同機構之間的泛化能力。在這裡，我們提出了一個基於物理的數據預處理框架，該框架基於PhyCV（物理啟發的計算機視覺）算法系列，通過來自光學物理的確定性變換標準化醫學影像。該框架將影像建模為空間變化的光場，這些光場經歷虛擬的衍射傳播，然後進行相干相位檢測。這一過程抑制了非語義變異性，例如顏色和照明差異，同時保留了診斷相關的紋理和結構特徵。當應用於Camelyon17-WILDS基準的組織病理學影像時，PhyCV預處理將乳腺癌分類的準確率從70.8%（經驗風險最小化基準）提高到90.9%，在計算成本幾乎可以忽略不計的情況下，與數據增強和領域泛化方法相匹配或超越。由於該變換在物理上可解釋、可參數化且可微分，因此可以作為固定的預處理階段進行部署或集成到端到端學習中。這些結果確立了PhyCV作為醫學影像的一個可泛化數據精煉器，通過第一原則物理學協調異質數據集，提高了臨床AI系統的穩健性、可解釋性和可重複性。
2603.15980.author: Callen MacPhee et.al.
2603.15980.authors: Callen MacPhee, Yiming Zhou, Koichiro Kishima, Bahram Jalali
